cobblemon_escape_rope.tooltip.descriptio: Escape to the last place you saw the sky.
cobblemon_escape_rope.msg.wrong_dimensio: The rope feels cold and inert in this dimension...
cobblemon_escape_rope.msg.can_not_see_sk: The rope cannot find a path to the sky!
cobblemon_escape_rope.msg.already_can_se: The rope goes slack. You are already under open sky.
cobblemon_escape_rope.msg.no_safe_destin: The rope frays... there is no safe place to emerge nearby.
cobblemon_escape_rope.msg.dimension_blac: This dimension is blacklisted for Escape Rope usage.
